title: cornus declinata
intro: Cornus declinata, also known as the cutleaf dogwood, is a deciduous shrub native to North America, characterized by its distinctive cutleaf or palmate foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cornus declinata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusement, and has also been used in traditional herbal remedies to treat fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
